name: t-img
description: T-IMG image hosting on Cloudflare Pages and Telegram Bot API

scripts.ci-test: concurrently --kill-others --success first "npm start" "wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:8080/upload-login && node scripts/run-pages-tests.js"
scripts.start: npx wrangler pages dev ./ --kv "img_url" --port 8080 --compatibility-date=2026-07-18 --binding BASIC_USER=local_admin --binding BASIC_PASS=local_development_only --binding UPLOAD_ACCESS_PASSWORD=local_development_upload_password --binding UPLOAD_SESSION_SECRET=local_development_session_secret_change_before_deploy --binding UPLOAD_SESSION_MAX_AGE=604800 --persist-to ./data
